title: スワンSの後に・切り開かれた可能性！

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I finally found it! I've found the path that turn me
into the ultra strong racer I want to be! I'm a
sprinter and miler!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
With today's results in mind, Trainer and I decide
to run in G1 sprints and miles next year! I'm
determined to be the best at both!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
First up, I'm going to become the champion of
sprints! My next goal race is the
Takamatsunomiya Kinen in the spring!
